mapper.select: SELECT lot_id AS lotId, lot_no AS lotNo, receipt_date AS receiptDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY receipt_date, lot_id) AS layerNo, qty_on_hand - qty_allocated AS availQty, unit_cost AS unitCost, ROUND((qty_on_hand - qty_allocated) * unit_cost, 4) AS layerAmount, SUM(qty_on_hand - qty_allocated) OVER (ORDER BY receipt_date, lot_id) AS cumQty, SUM(ROUND((qty_on_hand - qty_allocated) * unit_cost, 4)) OVER (ORDER BY receipt_date, lot_id) AS cumAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(qty_on_hand - qty_allocated) OVER (ORDER BY receipt_date, lot_id) >= (SELECT COALESCE(qty_on_hand - qty_allocated, 0) FROM t_inventory_balance WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isCovering FROM t_inventory_lot WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND status = 'AVAILABLE' AND qty_on_hand - qty_allocated > 0 ORDER BY receipt_date, lot_id

SELECT b.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, w.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, b.item_id AS itemId, it.item_code AS itemCode, it.item_name AS itemName, it.valuation_method AS valuationMethod, b.qty_on_hand AS qtyOnHand, CASE WHEN it.valuation_method = 'STD' THEN it.std_cost ELSE b.avg_cost END AS valUnitCost, ROUND(b.qty_on_hand * CASE WHEN it.valuation_method = 'STD' THEN it.std_cost ELSE b.avg_cost END, 4) AS stockValue, SUM(ROUND(b.qty_on_hand * CASE WHEN it.valuation_method = 'STD' THEN it.std_cost ELSE b.avg_cost END, 4)) OVER (PARTITION BY b.warehouse_id) AS whTotalValue FROM t_inventory_balance b JOIN t_item it ON it.item_id = b.item_id JOIN t_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = b.warehouse_id WHERE b.qty_on_hand > 0 AND (#{warehouseId} IS NULL OR b.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}) ORDER BY b.warehouse_id, stockValue DESC

WITH base AS ( SELECT pl.po_line_id AS poLineId, pl.line_no AS lineNo, pl.item_id AS itemId, it.item_code AS itemCode, it.item_name AS itemName, pl.qty_ordered AS qtyOrdered, pl.unit_price AS unitPrice, ROUND(pl.qty_ordered * pl.unit_price, 4) AS lineAmount, ROUND(pl.qty_ordered * COALESCE(it.weight_kg, 0), 4) AS lineWeight, CASE WHEN #{basis} = 'WGT' THEN ROUND(pl.qty_ordered * COALESCE(it.weight_kg, 0), 4) ELSE ROUND(pl.qty_ordered * pl.unit_price, 4) END AS allocBase FROM t_po_line pl JOIN t_item it ON it.item_id = pl.item_id WHERE pl.po_id = #{poId} ) SELECT poLineId, lineNo, itemId, itemCode, itemName, qtyOrdered, unitPrice, lineAmount, lineWeight, ROUND(#{freight} * allocBase / NULLIF(SUM(allocBase) OVER (), 0), 4) AS freightAlloc, ROUND(#{duty} * allocBase / NULLIF(SUM(allocBase) OVER (), 0), 4) AS dutyAlloc, lineAmount + ROUND(#{freight} * allocBase / NULLIF(SUM(allocBase) OVER (), 0), 4) + ROUND(#{duty} * allocBase / NULLIF(SUM(allocBase) OVER (), 0), 4) AS landedTotal, ROUND((lineAmount + ROUND(#{freight} * allocBase / NULLIF(SUM(allocBase) OVER (), 0), 4) + ROUND(#{duty} * allocBase / NULLIF(SUM(allocBase) OVER (), 0), 4)) / NULLIF(qtyOrdered, 0), 6) AS landedUnitCost FROM base ORDER BY lineNo
mapper.update: UPDATE t_item SET std_cost = #{stdCost}, updated_by = 'SYSTEM', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
